courseTitle: Track Studio I: Methods and Media
title: Text as System Game
genericDescription: Use language as playable material; connect text to state changes; avoid static exposition.
specificDescription: Build a game where words, prompts, labels, poems, commands, dialogue, metadata, or generated text directly alter play. Track lens determines whether the text is historical, poetic, or AI-mediated.
gradingRubric: 30 pts text-mechanic integration; 20 pts interaction depth; 20 pts track coherence; 15 pts readability and accessibility; 15 pts documentation.
